signals.learnerQuestion: How should I sequence Newrun and Sugam?
signals.coachingHint: Parallelize after concept completion crosses stable threshold.

signals.learnerQuestion: Can a base learner reach grade 1 in one year?
signals.coachingHint: Track routine completion rate instead of possibility debates.

signals.learnerQuestion: When should I use Sidaeinjae or Dugak classes?
signals.coachingHint: Split by season: closure (3-6), hard handling (6-9), final stability (9-final).
